title: ClusterNodeDetails
description: Schema for ClusterNodeDetails in Nuix REST API

guid.description: The unique identifier for the node.  This is generated based upon the serverId.

publicURL.description: The public URL of the node.

name.description: The friendly name of the node.

maxWorkers.description: The max number of workers of the node.

availableWorkers.description: The number of workers available on the node.

busyWorkers.description: The number of workers in use on the node.

tags.description: An array of tags applied to the node.  This can be used for node filtering when processing in a cluster.

roles.description: A list of cluster roles the node has been assigned.

restVersion.description: The customer version of the node.

engineVersion.description: The engine version of the node.
